name: Basics in gardening /// Arknights (Shu)
description:
Literally, Shu is teaching about gardening techniques under a warm kotatsu. Don't expect anything more. Thats all

I wanted to make this because the art was cool and i thought the idea of Shu as a tutor was cute and wholesome. I could say i made this bot for myself, yet wanted to publish it too. Anyways


Enjoy the bot!
creator: Delta C.
